basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant/ Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Research Assistant/Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Udaipur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountancy (CA) or MBA (Finance) or M.Com from a reputed Institute. Proficiency in excel and any statistical package is expected. Knowledge of programming language Python or R is preferred.
qualification.details: Chartered Accountancy (CA) or MBA (Finance) or M.Com from a reputed Institute. Proficiency in excel and any statistical package. Knowledge of programming language Python or R is preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Competitive salary, compensation and position will be aligned with qualification and experience, following IIMU norms for Research Assistants/ Associates.
salary_details.details: Competitive salary, compensation and position will be aligned with qualification and experience, following IIMU norms for Research Assistants/ Associates.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant/Associate position at IIM Udaipur is 23rd June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Chartered Accountancy (CA) or MBA (Finance) or M.Com from a reputed institute. Proficiency in Excel and any statistical package is also expected.

faq.question: Q3. Is knowledge of programming languages preferred for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, knowledge of programming languages like Python or R is preferred for the Research Assistant/Associate role at IIM Udaipur, although it is not a mandatory requirement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant/Associate position at the Indian Institute of Management Udaipur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official application portal.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant/Associate position at IIM Udaipur is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q7. Will there be any age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for this position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q8. How is the salary determined for this role?
faq.answer: The salary and compensation will be competitive and will be determined based on the candidate's qualifications and experience, adhering to IIM Udaipur's norms for Research Assistants/Associates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the 'Important Links' section of this article. The official website of IIM Udaipur is also provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant/Associate position?
faq.answer: The details regarding the selection process are not explicitly mentioned here. Candidates are encouraged to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.
